news.title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
news.summary: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.

news.title: Trump threatens to fire Powell if the Fed chair doesn't leave office on his own
news.summary: Though most Fed chairs in the past have left after being replaced, Powell has demurred on what he plans to do.

news.title: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says
news.summary: Trump accounts have signed up 5 million kids, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Here's what families need to know.

news.title: 美股盘前小幅上涨，投资者关注企业财报
news.summary: 美股三大指数期货盘前小幅上涨，投资者关注即将发布的摩根大通、花旗集团等银行股财报。市场预期一季度企业盈利增长放缓。

news.title: 亚洲市场收盘涨跌互现，日经指数创年内新高
news.summary: 亚洲主要股市收盘涨跌互现，日经225指数上涨0.8%创年内新高，上证指数微跌0.2%。香港恒生指数收涨0.5%。

news.title: 加密货币市场震荡，比特币测试7.6万美元阻力
news.summary: 比特币价格在7.5-7.6万美元区间震荡，以太坊价格稳定在3850美元附近。市场关注美国SEC对以太坊ETF的审批进展。

news.title: 大宗商品价格回落，黄金避险需求减弱
news.summary: 原油价格下跌1.2%至84.5美元，黄金价格回落至2370美元。美元指数走强压制大宗商品价格。
